headline: The Bull Case For Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Could Change Following AM Best Upgrade And Cyber Expansion
summary: In recent days, AM Best upgraded Arch Wilsure Insurance Company, part of Arch Capital Group, raising its Financial Strength Rating to A+ (Superior) and assigning stable outlooks, while analysts have continued to raise earnings expectations ahead of the company’s April 28, 2026 results release. Together with Arch’s expansion of its Arch CyPro cyber insurance offering into Canada, these developments highlight confidence in the group’s risk profile and its ability to broaden specialty...

headline: A Look At Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings
summary: Context on Arch Capital Group after recent price moves Arch Capital Group (ACGL) has seen relatively mixed share performance recently, with a 1 day return of 1.3%, a 7 day gain of 2.8%, a month decline of 3.7%, and a past 3 months return of 3.1%. See our latest analysis for Arch Capital Group. Looking beyond the recent pullback, Arch Capital Group’s 1 year total shareholder return of 0.5% contrasts with a much stronger 47.6% total shareholder return over 3 years and 154.0% over 5 years.
